assertions.title: Load valid v2 snapshot populates results in read-only mode

steps.action: Reset app, clear request/error logs, upload valid v2 snapshot JSON via Load result input
steps.expected: Snapshot load succeeds and app opens results in read-only mode
steps.observed: Results step rendered summary/filter/table from snapshot; read-only banner and Start new comparison button displayed.

steps.action: Inspect clean network capture after load
steps.expected: Snapshot load calls present and no follow-on /compare request
steps.observed: Clean log shows only POST /comparison-snapshot/load entries for session 2306b73e-7b90-464e-852e-8c84516b2489; /compare count was 0.

steps.expected: Mutating follow-on workflow is blocked with read-only message
steps.observed: UI surfaced: 'Loaded comparison snapshots are read-only. Use Reset to start a new comparison.'

assertions.title: Load malformed JSON surfaces parse error

steps.action: Clear logs and upload malformed snapshot JSON
steps.expected: Load fails with parse error; snapshot read-only remains inactive and no results are populated
steps.observed: UI displayed parse error: 'Failed to parse comparison snapshot file: EOF while parsing a value at line 1 column 24'; app stayed on file-selection step with empty file cards.

steps.expected: Snapshot-load endpoint called for failed upload; no compare call
steps.observed: Clean log captured only POST /comparison-snapshot/load for session ae854098-3388-49b4-a5e3-d7b05f3523f9; /compare count was 0.

assertions.title: Load v1.x snapshot shows explicit incompatibility (v2 behavior)

steps.expected: Explicit version/incompatibility error (not generic parse error); no results populated
steps.observed: UI displayed: 'Unsupported comparison snapshot version 1 — this file was produced by an older csv-align release. Re-run the comparison in v2.' while remaining on file-selection step.

steps.expected: Snapshot-load call recorded; no compare call
steps.observed: Clean log captured POST /comparison-snapshot/load entries only; /compare count was 0.

assertions.title: Snapshot with unknown columns shows error

steps.action: Upload v2 snapshot fixture referencing missing comparison column
steps.expected: 4xx-class load failure with missing-column message and no results populated
steps.observed: UI displayed: 'Saved snapshot comparison columns for File A reference missing columns: missing_a_col' and remained on file-selection step.

steps.expected: Snapshot-load call recorded; no compare call
steps.observed: Clean log captured POST /comparison-snapshot/load entries only; /compare count was 0.

steps.action: Load sample CSVs, configure key+comparison selections, clear logs, click Save pair order
steps.observed: Download artifact created immediately and parsed as JSON with version, headers_a/headers_b, and selection keys/comparison arrays.
Clean log captured POST /pair-order/save entries for session 6d9fe949-105f-4a98-97b9-0ae40ac9b948; /compare count was 0.

steps.action: Change current comparison chips to a different mapping, then upload valid pair-order file
steps.expected: Selection restores saved pair order with no auto-compare
steps.observed: Mapping restored to 'full_name → name' and Run Comparison stayed idle; no results-step transition occurred.
Clean log captured POST /pair-order/load entries for session 6d9fe949-105f-4a98-97b9-0ae40ac9b948; /compare count was 0.

assertions.title: Load pair-order with unknown columns shows error

steps.action: Capture pre-load mapping, upload pair-order fixture with unknown comparison column
steps.expected: Load fails with missing-column message and prior selection remains unchanged
steps.observed: UI showed: 'Saved comparison columns for File A reference missing columns: missing_pair_col' and mapping remained 'full_name → name'.
Clean log captured POST /pair-order/load entries only; /compare count was 0.

assertions.title: Load pair-order blocked in read-only snapshot mode

steps.action: Enter read-only snapshot mode, clear request log, then attempt follow-on workflow navigation
steps.expected: Read-only short-circuit message shown and no pair-order/load request sent
steps.observed: UI surfaced read-only message ('Loaded comparison snapshots are read-only. Use Reset to start a new comparison.'); clean network log had zero requests, including zero /pair-order/load.

steps.expected: Mutating controls are blocked/hidden in read-only snapshot mode
steps.observed: Only read-only results controls remained available with Start new comparison; pair-order controls were not exposed.

assertions.title: No console errors in persistence happy paths

steps.action: Run happy-path flows VAL-PERSIST-009, VAL-PERSIST-013, and VAL-PERSIST-014 with errors log cleared before each
steps.observed: agent-browser errors output remained empty after each happy-path run.

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture duplicated each fetch event multiple times and did not include response status/body fields.
frictions.resolution: Used per-assertion clean request logs (network requests --clear) and paired endpoint counts with observed UI success/error messages.

frictions.description: File uploads are hidden inputs behind dropzone/label controls; role=button refs are not directly uploadable.
frictions.resolution: Targeted hidden input selectors directly (input[data-testid='load-result-input'], input[type=file], input[accept='.csv'] >> nth=...).

summary: Validated 9 assigned persistence assertions (VAL-PERSIST-009 through VAL-PERSIST-017): all passed. Snapshot load/read-only behavior, malformed/legacy/missing-column error handling, pair-order save/load/error paths, read-only blocking semantics, and console cleanliness for happy paths were confirmed with UI and isolated network evidence.
